notes: Wave 2B.1 builder vectors. Cross-language byte-equivalence contract for the Rust SDK (bsv-rust-sdk). Regenerate via `npm run emit:builder-vectors`.

vectors.description: Plain DSTAS transfer of full balance to counterparty (no change output).
Plain DSTAS transfer of full balance to counterparty (with P2PKH change output).
Plain DSTAS transfer with an OP_RETURN note carrying ASCII bytes.
Split a 2000-sat DSTAS UTXO into 2 equal 1000-sat outputs.
Split a 1000-sat DSTAS UTXO into 3 unequal outputs (250 + 350 + 400).
Split a single 4000-sat DSTAS UTXO into 4 equal 1000-sat outputs to the counterparty.
Merge two DSTAS UTXOs (300+700) into a single 1000-sat output to counterparty.

3-way merge is not yet supported by BuildDstasMergeTx (limited to exactly 2 STAS inputs). Recorded as a placeholder; Wave 2A.2 will expand Rust merge to N-way and this vector will be regenerated once the TS factory supports N>=3.

inputs.note: placeholder — TS factory does not yet support N-way merges

vectors.description: Owner re-marks a swap UTXO with cancel-shape action data (requestedScriptHash=zero, rate=0/0). Spending-type=4.
Owner cancels a swap-marked UTXO by spending to self with no action data; spending-type=4.
Two-sided STAS-STAS swap executed via BuildDstasSwapSwapTx (both inputs spending-type=4).
Asymmetric swap where A is swap-marked and B is plain — built via BuildDstasTransferSwapTx (spending-type=1).
Freeze authority spends a STAS UTXO setting Frozen=true on the same owner; spending-type=2.
Freeze authority unfreezes a previously-frozen STAS UTXO; spending-type=2.
Confiscation authority transfers a STAS UTXO to the issuer; spending-type=3.

Issuer redeems an issuer-owned STAS UTXO by spending to a P2MPKH issuer output (token destruction); spending-type=1, no DSTAS outputs. STAS UTXO is minted directly to the issuer so its owner field equals TokenId (required by template).
Mint flow producing contract+issue tx pair: P2PKH funding -> contract output (P2PKH+OP_RETURN scheme) -> DSTAS issue output to owner.
